meaning: adj.[医]夸大狂的n.夸大狂患者
examples: I think he thought he was the king of the world. He became a bit of a megalomaniac.
Poverty in the world compromises man more than anything else and will no doubt bring about the downfall of such a megalomaniac animal.
The megalomaniac differs from the narcissist by the fact that he wishes to be powerful rather than charming , and seeks to be feared rather than loved.
This gives them a reference point, without making you look like a self-obsessed megalomaniac.
If anything, that admission only further damaged his credibility: The crackpot artist was now also deemed a megalomaniac.
